item.name: Jointed Razorfish
item.description:
This tiny creature, with its peculiar swimming habits, stands out more than it likely wishes to.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: In stark contrast to its closest kin, the seahorse, this wavekin has a smooth, tubular body. It is known to swim vertically, an adaptation that naturalists suspect is intended to mimic the movement of seaweed.
